context: Tests whether the agent implements the parametric CLV prediction formula correctly, applies the recency-based lifespan adjustment, uses the correct churn probability sigmoid, handles edge cases for customers with 0 or 1 orders, and applies the 50% gross margin assumption.

checklist.name: Parametric CLV formula
checklist.description: calculatePredictedCLV uses the formula: (AOV × purchaseFrequency × grossMarginRate) / (1 + discountRate - repeatPurchaseRate), where repeatPurchaseRate = 1 - 1/avgCustomerLifespanYears

checklist.name: Cold-start fallback
checklist.description: predictCustomerCLV falls back to a cold-start calculation (calls a separate function or returns a default) when the customer has fewer than 2 orders

checklist.name: Recency-based lifespan adjustment
checklist.description: predictCustomerCLV uses full projectionYears for customers inactive less than 90 days, and half projectionYears (projectionYears * 0.5) for customers inactive 90 or more days

checklist.name: 50% gross margin applied
checklist.description: predictCustomerCLV multiplies projected revenue by 0.50 (50% gross margin rate) when computing the final CLV value

checklist.name: Filter cancelled orders
checklist.description: Order queries in predictCustomerCLV and/or calculateChurnProbability exclude cancelled orders (e.g., status not equal to 'cancelled')

checklist.name: Churn edge case: no purchases
checklist.description: calculateChurnProbability returns 0.95 when the customer has no orders

checklist.name: Churn edge case: single purchase
checklist.description: calculateChurnProbability returns 0.65 when the customer has exactly one order

checklist.name: Sigmoid churn formula
checklist.description: calculateChurnProbability uses a sigmoid function: 1 / (1 + exp(-2 * (recencyRatio - 2))), where recencyRatio = daysSinceLastOrder / avgInterval

checklist.name: Churn probability clamped
checklist.description: calculateChurnProbability clamps the returned value to the range [0.01, 0.99] (i.e., uses Math.min(0.99, Math.max(0.01, ...)))

checklist.name: README documents assumptions
checklist.description: README.md mentions the 50% gross margin assumption and the 90-day recency threshold for lifespan adjustment

checklist.name: Purchase frequency calculation
checklist.description: Per-customer purchase frequency is computed as 365 / avgPurchaseIntervalDays, where avgPurchaseIntervalDays = tenureDays / (orders.length - 1)
